🩺 Commercial Cleaning Service

Nightly Medical Office Cleaning in Atlanta Metro

Five-nights-a-week after-hours cleaning.

Santos Cleaning Solutions provides nightly medical office cleaning service across Atlanta Metro. Insured, background-checked teams. EPA-registered products. Written scope signed before work begins.

Get a Free Quote → Call (866) 350-9407

Why Nightly Medical Office Cleaning Works

Most businesses open five days per week with standard business hours. Nightly service is the default choice for corporate offices, medical practices, daycares, and mid-size gyms.

  • Zero disruption to business hours
  • Fresh environment every morning
  • Consistent team assignment for security and quality
  • Full access to every room without occupants present
  • Standard 5 nights Monday through Friday
PricingNightly service typically runs $0.07–$0.14 per square foot per visit, depending on segment and complexity.

Insurance & Compliance

All Santos Cleaning Solutions staff are background-checked, uniformed, and supervised. We carry General Liability $1,000,000 per occurrence, Products and Completed Operations $2,000,000 aggregate, and Personal and Advertising Injury $1,000,000. Certificate of Insurance available on request. We name clients as Additional Insured at no cost.
